response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio matches the provided reference lyrics perfectly, including both the group performance of 'GIRLS' LEGEND U' and Omaru Polka's solo original 'STARTING OVER'.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the reference lyrics for transcription and disambiguation, and added the prominent on-screen credit title card for 'STARTING OVER' as a Visual Event.
3. Timing & Pacing: Strictly anchored timestamps to vocal events, ensuring seamless sequential transitions and no trailing text during instrumental interludes.

subtitles.original: 夏も秋も冬も超え願い焦がれ走れ
subtitles.english: Even through summer, autumn, and winter, run with burning desire
Ah, to victory

subtitles.original: 未来描くロード目指し
subtitles.english: Aiming for the road that draws the future

subtitles.original: 狙い 挑め 掴め winny
subtitles.english: Aim, challenge, and seize victory!

subtitles.original: ずっとずっとずっとずっと想い
subtitles.english: My long-held, everlasting thoughts...
...because our dreams will surely come true.

subtitles.original: あの日のキミが流した
subtitles.english: Those tears that you shed on that day...
...believe in them too.

subtitles.original: 雨も風も雲も闇も超え願い焦がれ走れ
subtitles.english: Beyond the rain, wind, clouds, and darkness, run with desire and yearning
Ah, to victory

subtitles.original: Don't stop! No, don't stop 'til finish!!
subtitles.english: Don't stop! No, don't stop 'til finish!!

subtitles.original:
STARTING OVER
作詞：こだまさおり
作曲・編曲：睦月周平
subtitles.english:
[STARTING OVER]
Lyrics: Saori Kodama
Composition & Arrangement: Shuhei Mutsuki
It's finally the true end
I'm ready for... my destiny
It's finally the true end
I'm ready for... STARTING OVER
I was finally able to lower the curtain
Until the very last moment,
I, with all my might,
lived my life to the fullest.
The sequel to this final curtain...
...is something no one needs to know.
Leaving our tears behind,
let's set out on a new journey.
The passion chooses you
it was simply a different ending.

subtitles.original: 同じ愛になれなかった Destiny
subtitles.english: A destiny where we couldn't share the same love
It was a love where I would offer...

subtitles.original: 差し出すような愛だった
subtitles.english: ...everything I had up until now.

subtitles.original: 世界の意味が変わるくらいに
subtitles.english: To the point where the meaning of the world changed,

subtitles.original: 肯定された気がしたんだ
subtitles.english: I felt fully accepted.
Amidst the casual everyday moments,

subtitles.original: 気づけた最初の奇跡が
subtitles.english: the first miracle I realized...

subtitles.original: あなたでよかった わたしでよかった
subtitles.english: ...was how glad I am it was you, how glad I am it was me.
I could truly believe it from the bottom of my heart.
Even in the far-off future,

subtitles.original: ちゃんと覚えていよう
subtitles.english: let's remember it properly.
How to embrace myself,
and how to wish for tomorrow.
Even if you are no longer here,
in a corner of my heart,
a gentle light...

subtitles.original: 消えたりしないとわかる
subtitles.english: ...I know will never fade away.

subtitles.original: 今はまだ手を振れるほど
subtitles.english: Though our paths have only just split...
...to the point where I can still wave goodbye,

subtitles.original: 後ろ髪に風を感じながら
subtitles.english: while feeling the wind in my hair from behind.
Everything up until that point...

subtitles.original: あなたに出会うためだった
subtitles.english: ...was meant to lead me to you.

subtitles.original: どの瞬間もムダじゃないこと
subtitles.english: That not a single moment was in vain,

subtitles.original: 本当の意味で知れたから
subtitles.english: I have finally learned its true meaning.
At the next corner as well,

subtitles.original: 自分らしさで選べるはず
subtitles.english: I should be able to choose my own way.
Connecting to some day,

subtitles.original: 新しい一歩 信じて歩き出そう
subtitles.english: let's believe in this new step and walk forward.
That I was able to love someone from my heart...
...those days...

subtitles.original: 間違いなくわたしの Destiny Ah
subtitles.english: ...were without a doubt my Destiny, ah...
Everything up until now...
...gives me new strength.

subtitles.original: どの瞬間もムダじゃないなら
subtitles.english: If not a single moment was in vain,

subtitles.original: 何が起きても大丈夫だから
subtitles.english: then no matter what happens, I will be okay.
For the next story too,

subtitles.original: 自分らしさで選べるはず
subtitles.english: I should be able to choose my own way.
Connecting to some day,

subtitles.original: わたしのはじまり 信じて歩き出そう
subtitles.english: let's believe in my new beginning and walk forward.
